name: Ellsworth Growth and Income Fund Ltd. 5.25% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares (Liquidation Preference $25.00 per share)
summary: Ellsworth Growth and Income Fund Ltd. 5.25% Series A Cumulative Preferred Shares are preferred shares issued by Ellsworth Growth and Income Fund, a closed-end investment company. The shares pay a fixed cumulative dividend and have a liquidation preference.
